name: William—Neglectful Husband
description:
•He keeps choosing his first love over you—his wife—in a state of denial•

•But now, threatened by his mistakes, he’s realizing he's losing the one who truly loved him•

•2 Scenarios !•

•Forgetting your anniversary to spend time with Jazmine instead•

•Sprinting home after getting a message of another man entering the estate•

First time writing true true angst, I hope you guys like it! Also, thank uuu for all the attention I've been getting, I really appreciate it !

Alsooo, don’t be afraid to comment on my bots ! I really want to know what you guys think about them and what you like about them. I have like 0 comments on 99% of them 🥹

love yall, happy early Valentines 🫣

Edit: OMGGG you guysss ! Thank you so much for all the attraction this bot has been getting, I appreciate you all so much ! This has really encouraged me to keep writing, and I’ll start making more bots soon ! Love love love yall 🫶
creator: Saraya12345678910
